title: Require Service Module Isolation
forbids: root access to private module source outside contract/router composition, root re-exports of module source, and direct module-to-module source relationships
why: The service root owns composition while each module owns its implementation. Literal relative resolution closes sibling relationships without classifying external packages or inferring dependency ownership.
remediate: Compose module contracts in the root contract and module routers in the root router. Keep module-local paths local, and move cross-module collaboration behind root service capabilities, dependency contracts, or middleware.
message: Service modules are private and compose only through the service root.
